seo.title: EmpowerHer Studio | Women’s Health & Wellness Coaching
seo.description: Evidence-informed women’s health and wellness coaching with a focus on strength training, sustainable fat loss, and lifestyle support.

hero.headline: Strength training for women who want to feel stronger — not smaller.
hero.subheadline: Evidence‑informed coaching and strength-focused programming designed for women who want sustainable results — with support, structure, and a plan that fits real life.
highlights: Strength training support for women’s health and longevity
Hormone health, osteoporosis support, and healthy ageing
Sustainable fat loss and confidence-building coaching

about.title: A safe, supportive space — with a practical plan
paragraphs: EmpowerHer Studio is a women’s health and wellness coaching studio focused on helping you build strength, confidence, and self‑trust through evidence‑informed training.
We’re here to help you stop shrinking yourself — and start building a body that supports you through every stage of life.
bullets: Strength training for long-term health and resilience
Support for hormonal change, chronic pain, and osteoporosis risk
Simple, sustainable habits — starting with just 5 minutes

whoYouHelp.title: This space is for you if…
items: You feel weak, tired, or overwhelmed
You’ve been told your symptoms are “normal”
You’re navigating menopause, postpartum, or chronic pain
You’re scared of getting injured or don’t know where to start
You want to feel strong again

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Start with coaching and grow into training support that fits your goals.

items.title: Hormone Balance & Healthy Ageing Support
items.desc: Lifestyle and training guidance to support hormone-related symptoms, bone health, and long-term wellbeing.

items.title: Sustainable Fat Loss + Strength Building
items.desc: A structured approach that prioritises consistency, progressive strength training, and sustainable nutrition habits.

items.title: Science‑Backed Lifestyle Strategies
items.desc: Practical strategies to support energy, mood, recovery, and quality of life.

items.title: Personal 1:1 Training
items.desc: One‑on‑one training sessions tailored to your body, your stage of life, and your goals.

natasha.name: Natasha Shaw
natasha.headline: Previously registered Biokinetic practitioner and founder of EmpowerHer Studio.
story: Natasha is a previously registered Biokinetic practitioner and the founder of EmpowerHer Studio — a space created for women who are ready to rebuild their strength, confidence, and trust in their bodies.

Her journey into women’s health was shaped not only through her studies and clinical experience, but through deeply personal experiences that changed the way she sees strength, health, and what it truly means to feel well.

Working with frail patients early in her career, and witnessing her own grandmother struggle with severe osteoporosis, Natasha made a quiet promise to herself: she would never allow her body to become fragile — and she would help other women do the same.

Over time, her focus shifted beyond aesthetics. She became passionate about helping women move away from the idea that they need to be smaller, and instead embrace the idea that they deserve to be stronger, more capable, and more resilient.

Her approach is rooted in simplicity and sustainability — often starting with one powerful question: “Can you give me just 5 minutes?” Because real change doesn’t start with perfection — it starts with small, consistent actions.

Natasha’s work is also deeply influenced by her own health journey. After years of being dismissed by medical professionals and told her pain was “in her head,” she was finally diagnosed with endometriosis in 2019. That moment — of being seen, heard, and validated — became a turning point.
Later, being diagnosed with ADHD at 35 helped her understand years of feeling “too much,” “too sensitive,” or “not enough.” These experiences shaped her mission even further:
To create a space where women are no longer dismissed. Where they are not told to shrink, to push through, or to accept discomfort as normal. Where they are seen, heard, and supported.

At EmpowerHer Studio, Natasha works with women across all stages of life — from postpartum to menopause — helping them build strength safely and confidently, especially those at risk of or living with osteoporosis, chronic pain, or hormonal changes.
Her philosophy is simple: You are not broken. Your body is not the problem. You are capable of so much more than you’ve been led to believe.
natasha.shortBio: Natasha is a previously registered Biokinetic practitioner and founder of EmpowerHer Studio, helping women build strength, confidence, and resilience at every stage of life. With a special focus on osteoporosis, hormonal health, and sustainable strength training, she is passionate about shifting women away from the pressure to be smaller — and towards becoming stronger, more capable, and empowered in their own bodies. Her work is deeply personal, shaped by her own journey with endometriosis and ADHD, and driven by a mission to create a space where women feel truly seen, heard, and supported.
taglines: You are stronger than you feel, and more capable than you know.
A space for women to rebuild strength, confidence, and self-trust.
